vague_intent: sync my tasks between my two tools
true_intent: When I add or complete a task in Todoist, mirror that change into a Notion 'Tasks' database so my Notion workspace always reflects Todoist. It's one-way, Todoist to Notion — Notion is just the readable mirror.
must_clarify: sync direction (one-way vs two-way, and which is source)
what counts as a task change to sync (add / complete / update)
must_not_assume: two-way sync when the user wants one-way
specific tools without asking which two
notes: 'my two tools' names neither endpoint — must ask BOTH. Direction is a classic under-specified axis (one-way vs two-way); assuming two-way is a real correctness risk. Multi-slot disambiguation in one capability.
